# API Contracts

## REST API Endpoints: Knowledge, Auto-Evolve, Daily Review, Scanner

Knowledge: GET /api/knowledge/entries?project=&category=&status=&page=&per_page=, GET /api/knowledge/entries/stats?project=, GET /api/knowledge/entries/:id, PUT /api/knowledge/entries/:id, PUT /api/knowledge/entries/:id/outdated, DELETE /api/knowledge/entries/:id, POST /api/knowledge/scan, GET /api/knowledge/projects, GET /api/knowledge/autocomplete?project=&q=. Auto-Evolve: GET /api/auto-evolves/stats, GET /api/auto-evolves?status=&target_type=, GET /api/auto-evolves/:id, PUT /api/auto-evolves/:id/revert. Daily Review: GET /api/daily-reviews/stats, GET /api/daily-reviews?review_date=&status=&category=, GET /api/daily-reviews/:id, PUT /api/daily-reviews/:id/accept, PUT /api/daily-reviews/:id/dismiss, POST /api/daily-reviews/run. Scanner: POST /api/scanner/run, GET /api/scanner/latest, GET /api/scanner/history?limit=.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_
